title: AI agents explained: Build your first agent in 8 minutes
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates building autonomous multi-agent systems using Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial covers the ReAct framework and three agent patterns (sequential, reactive, planning), then builds a practical auto-correcting blog writer agent combining Planner and Writer agents with validation and retry logic.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through building autonomous multi-agent systems with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial introduces the ReAct framework and three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning. It then builds an auto-correcting blog writer that combines a Planner agent and a Writer agent with validation checkers and retry logic, showing how agents coordinate, use tools, and self-correct through an agentic workflow.
